problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Quantum. Quantum tunneling through energy barrier directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 6 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
